name: Steamed Shredded Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
Steaming vegetables is common in many culinary traditions and this recipe offers a dish suitable for non-Chinese meals as well.
1. Toast the white sesame seeds in a dry wok over low heat until fragrant.
2. Wash the cabbage thoroughly, then slice it into 1/2-inch shreds. Tear the head apart to create loose shreds.
3. Sprinkle salt over the shredded cabbage and let stand uncovered for 10 minutes to remove excess moisture.
4. Place the cabbage on a serving platter and steam in a Chinese steamer basket for 5 minutes until tender but still crisp.
5. Heat oil in a small pan or ladle over medium heat to prevent the vegetable from cooling during serving.
6. Remove the cooked cabbage from the steamer, drizzle with hot oil, and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds on top.
7. Serve immediately.
